quotes: its very good app clean and simple but it will be more beneficial if they add grouping system in watchlists like kite have launched recently
Excellent application. unfortunately I closed my trading account. Now I want to reopen my trading account. But there are no option to reopen
Overall Good but must be a separate Section for all Portfolio. where I can see all my investment in one place (ETF ,MF , Stocks , Bonds etc.)
action_ideas: Enhance watchlist functionality by adding a grouping system for better organization.
Create a unified portfolio section to display all investment types (stocks, ETFs, MFs) in one place.
Develop a clear, accessible feature for users to reopen previously closed trading accounts.
